title: Undead King summons from cemetery as a Limited Summon

card.rawText: During your turn, roll 1 die. If the result is 3-6, you may summon a creature from your cemetery as a Limited Summon. Limited Summon(s) return to the cemetery if this card leaves the field, switches control, or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Undead King summons from cemetery as a Limited Summon
plan.summary: During player_1's turn, activate Undead King, roll a successful 3-6, choose a creature from player_1 cemetery, and verify it enters the field as a Limited Summon.

notes: Place Undead King on player_1 field as primary.
Put an Undead creature in player_1 cemetery before activation.

steps: Player_1 activates Undead King's once-per-turn style effect.
Resolve the forced effect roll as 5.
Choose the cemetery creature as the Limited Summon target.
Inspect player_1 field creatures and cemetery.
manualVerification: Confirm failed 1-2 rolls do not summon a creature.
riskNotes: This covers the successful summon branch. Source invalidation cleanup is covered by 004-E02.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate successful cemetery Limited Summon branch.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
